Syllabus Spring 2024

Lesson Date Topic Reading Worksheets
1 3/4/2026 Introduction: Syllabus / Overview
2 3/6/2026 Review: Definitions / Ohm's Law / Kirchhoff's Laws Review Part 1
3 3/9/2026 DC Analysis: Series / Parallel / Voltage Divider / Current Divider
4 3/11/2026 DC Analysis: Series / Parallel / Voltage Divider / Current Divider Review Part 2
5 3/13/2026 DC Analysis: Combine Series Parallel Circuits Parallel Series Analysis
6 3/16/2026 DC Analysis: Application WSB Wheatstone Bridge
7 3/18/2026 DC Analysis: Grounds and Commons Grounds and Commons
8 3/20/2026 Quiz 1
9 3/23/2026 Introduction to Sensors: Part 1 Transfer Functions Transfer Functions
10 2/25/2026 DC Analysis: Superposition and Linearity Superposition
11 3/27/2026 DC Analysis: Node Mesh Analysis Node Mesh
12 3/30/2026 DC Analysis: Node Mesh Analysis
13 4/1/2026 Quiz 2
14 4/3/2026 Complex Numbers: Basic Operations Complex Numbers
15 4/6/2026 AC Analysis: Complex Impedance Complex Impedance
16 4/8/2026 AC Analysis: Circuit Analysis Part 1 AC Analysis Part 1
17 4/10/2026 AC Analysis: Circuit Analysis Part 2 AC Analysis Part 2
18 4/13/2026 Exam 1 Review
19 4/15/2026 Exam 1
20 4/22/2026 Frequency Domain: Introduction Fourier Transform Discussion
21 4/24/2026 Frequency Domain: Resonance Resonance
22 4/27/2026 Frequency Domain: Filters Filters
23 4/29/2026 Frequency Domain: Frequency Response Functions Part 1 FRF
24 5/1/2026 Frequency Domain: Frequency Response Functions Part 2
25 5/4/2026 Quiz 3
26 5/6/2026 Solid State Devices: Introduction PN junctions / Diodes
27 5/8/2026 Solid State Devices: Transistors / NPN Bipolar Junction Transistors Transistors
28 5/11/2026 Op - Amps: Basic Circuits / Gain Op Amps Introduction
29 5/13/2026 Op - Amps: Equation Building 1 Equation Building 1
30 5/15/2026 Op - Amps: Equation Building 2 Equation Building 2
31 5/18/2026 Introduction to Sensors: Part 2 WSB to Op - Amp Circuit Signal Conditioning
32 5/20/2026 Quiz 4
33 5/22/2026 Boolean Opperators: Introduction
34 5/26/2026 Combinational Logic: Logic Gates Logic Gates: Intro
35 5/27/2026 Combinational Logic: Circuits Logic Gates: Application
36 5/29/2026 Base Counting Systems: Introduction / Bin to Dec / Hex to Dec
37 6/1/2026 Base Counting Systems: Dec to Bin / Dec to Hex / Hex to Bin / Bin to Hex
38 6/3/2026 Exam 2 Review
39 6/5/2026 Exam 2
40 6/8/2026 Final Review
